lead.title: Iran War Live Updates: Attacks in Red Sea Send Oil Prices Over $100 a Barrel

items.title: ‘We Will All Die From Ebola Here’: Virus Stalks Crowded Camps in Congo

items.title: Oil-Rich Saudi Arabia Isn’t Short on Energy. Here’s Why It Wants to Go Nuclear.

items.title: Why I Sought Out a Taliban Commander I Had Fought
